# CalypsoAI

## RSA 2026
- Booth number and hall (if known): CalypsoAI's specific booth number and hall for RSA Conference 2026 are not publicly known. Given the announced acquisition by F5, CalypsoAI's presence at RSA 2026 is likely to be integrated into F5's booth or messaging.
- Any updated booth info from the conference floor: As of March 24, 2026, specific real-time updates from the conference floor regarding CalypsoAI's booth are not available through web search.

## Company Profile
- Employee count (approximate): CalypsoAI has approximately 67-71 employees.
- Founded year: 2018.
- HQ location: CalypsoAI maintains co-headquarters in New York, NY, USA, and Dublin, Ireland. The company also has historical roots in Silicon Valley/San Mateo, California, and Washington D.C..
- Funding stage or public status / ARR if known: CalypsoAI was acquired by F5 for $180 million, with the transaction expected to close by September 30, 2025. Prior to the acquisition, CalypsoAI had raised over $40 million in venture funding, with some sources indicating total funding up to $63 million. Estimated annual revenue is in the range of $10 million to $25 million.
- Website URL: https://calypsoai.com.

## Technology Stack
- Core technology and architecture: CalypsoAI provides an enterprise-grade AI security and orchestration platform designed to secure AI systems, applications, and agents at the inference layer.
